agency: NYC Mayor's Office of Food Policy
description: Free food resources available to all NYC residents. Includes food pantries, community kitchens, and food distribution sites across all five boroughs.

eligibility.notes: No income test. No ID required at most sites. Available to all NYC residents.

apply_in_person: Visit any food pantry or community kitchen. Find locations at the URL above or call 311.
how_to_apply: No application needed. Visit any food pantry, community kitchen, or food distribution site. Call 311 or visit the website to find locations near you.
citation: NYC Mayor's Office of Food Policy
